chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 905 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.4824/2025 2. For order on office objections No.1, 2, 6 & 5 3. For orders on Misc. No.4825/2025 4. For orders on Misc. No.4826/2025 5. For hearing of main case 03.03.2025 Ms. Rizwana Ismail, advocate for the petitioner 1. Granted. 3. Granted subject to all just exceptions. 2,4&5. The petitioner assails order dated 21.02.2025 whereby the bidder was disqualified on account of having failed in mandatory requirements. Per learned counsel matter has been escalated before the C.R.C. on 25.02.2025, whereafter hearing has also taken place on 27.02.2025 and decision is awaited. No cause for parallel recourse to writ jurisdiction is made out and in view thereof read with office objections placed on record petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed in limine along with pending application/s. Judge Judge Amjad
